summary.summary: The DeviceDataManager protocol's bolusTrigger property was changed from PassthroughSubject<BolusStatus, Never> to CurrentValueSubject<BolusStatus, Never>, and BaseDeviceDataManager's implementation was changed from a PassthroughSubject to a CurrentValueSubject initialized with .noBolus (diff:b5239e390f2a, file:360227b79652, commit:191743b81a65). The change is part of PR pr:nightscout/Trio#1305 (pr:gordolio/Trio#1305, commit:891edfc9a8b6).
summary.userFacingImpact: The patch changes the type and initialization of bolusTrigger in the codebase (diff:b5239e390f2a, file:360227b79652, commit:191743b81a65). The provided sources do not state the intended runtime or UI effects of this change; a human review is required to determine behavioral or user-facing impact.
